nav.focusAreas.all.title: All Focus Areas
nav.focusAreas.all.description: Driving innovation across five key areas to create a faster, safer, more private, reliable, and measurable Internet.
nav.focusAreas.morePrivate.description: Developing privacy-preserving systems and protocols that protect users while enabling a more secure and trustworthy Internet.
nav.focusAreas.safer.description: Creating production-quality security defenses that address network interference and ensure safe, reliable global connectivity.
nav.focusAreas.faster.description: Advancing distributed systems and caching technologies that minimize latency and accelerate the global Internet.
nav.focusAreas.moreReliable.description: Building robust distributed systems and time synchronization protocols that ensure the Internet remains stable and available at scale.
nav.focusAreas.moreMeasurable.descriptio: Promoting accountability in Internet infrastructure through open standards like Certificate Transparency and tools that make critical systems verifiable.

home.hero.heading: Cloudflare research bridges the gap between theory and Internet-scale application
home.hero.subheading: Helping build a better Internet through research and implementation
home.focusAreas.heading: Helping build a better Internet
home.focusAreas.safer.blurb: Pioneering new cryptographic and security methods.
home.focusAreas.moreReliable.blurb: Optimising distributed systems for resilience at a global scale.
home.focusAreas.moreMeasurable.blurb: Increasing visibility into Internet systems through open measurement, research, and shared data.
home.featured.label: Featured Research
home.whatsNew.heading: What's New
home.whatsNew.subheading: New research, publications, and insights from our ongoing work.
home.careers.heading: Careers in Research
home.careers.subheading: Help shape a safer, more reliable, and more transparent Internet.
home.metaDescription: Cloudflare Research explores the future of the internet by bridging the gap between academic theory and real-world implementation. Discover our work in cryptography, networking, security, and privacy to help build a better, more secure web.
people.heading: People
people.metaDescription: Meet the scientists, engineers, and researchers at Cloudflare. Learn from the diverse team of experts dedicated to advancing internet security, privacy, and performance through innovative research and real-world implementation.
presentations.heading: Presentations & Keynotes
presentations.subheading: We share our work to promote the widespread deployment of useful ideas and help the industry adopt new innovations.
presentations.metaDescription: Sharing our work to promote the deployment of useful ideas. Explore Cloudflare Research presentations and keynotes on the innovations and standards shaping the future of a global, secure internet.
focus.heading: All Focus Areas
focus.subheading: Driving innovation across five key areas to create a faster, safer, more private, reliable, and measurable Internet.
focus.morePrivate.subheading: Developing privacy-preserving systems and protocols that protect users while enabling a more secure and trustworthy Internet.
focus.morePrivate.metaDescription: Advancing privacy-preserving systems. Access the latest research, publications, and open standards from Cloudflare dedicated to user privacy, data minimization, and secure internet protocols.
focus.safer.subheading: Creating production-quality security defenses that address network interference and ensure safe, reliable global connectivity.
focus.safer.metaDescription: Creating production-quality security defenses for the modern web. Explore Cloudflare Research on network interference, advanced cryptography, and the protocols ensuring safe, global connectivity against emerging threats.
focus.faster.subheading: Advancing distributed systems and caching technologies that minimize latency and accelerate the global Internet.
focus.faster.metaDescription: Driving innovation to create a faster internet. Discover how Cloudflare Research is optimizing web protocols and network architecture to eliminate bottlenecks and deliver instantaneous digital experiences at global scale.
focus.moreReliable.subheading: Building robust distributed systems and time synchronization protocols that ensure the Internet remains stable and available at scale.
focus.moreReliable.metaDescription: Ensuring a stable and available Internet. Explore Cloudflare Research on robust distributed systems, secure time synchronization protocols, and the architecture that keeps global networks resilient at scale.
focus.moreMeasurable.subheading: Promoting accountability in Internet infrastructure through open standards like Certificate Transparency and tools that make critical systems verifiable.
focus.moreMeasurable.metaDescription: Promoting accountability in Internet infrastructure. Explore Cloudflare Research on open standards, Certificate Transparency, and the tools making global systems verifiable, transparent, and measurable.
philosophy.heading: Our Philosophy
philosophy.subheading: Solving the Internet's most complex challenges by turning bleeding-edge research into production-ready reality.
philosophy.openCollaboration: Open collaboration, open standards, and open source
error404.heading: 404: Still a Hypothesis
error404.subheading: Our goal is to take computer science domains from hypothesis to reality. Unfortunately, this specific page is still just a hypothesis.
seo.morePrivate: Access publications and insights on privacy-preserving technologies and the protocols securing the future of digital privacy.
seo.safer: Access publications and tools focused on network security, anti-censorship technologies, and modern cryptographic defenses.
seo.faster: Access publications and insights on high-speed connectivity, HTTP/3, and the future of optimized internet infrastructure.
seo.moreReliable: Access publications and insights on internet reliability, distributed architecture, and the foundational protocols of a dependable global network.
seo.moreMeasurable: Access publications and insights on internet measurement, verifiable systems, and the open standards ensuring a more transparent web
